name: The OT Practice
description: The company offers expert occupational therapy services directly to private and business clients, emphasizing independence and quality care through a large network of leading therapists. Their nationwide team provides therapy in various settings, including homes and schools, and has adapted to deliver care remotely.

name: Nightingale Home Healthcare
description: The company offers a comprehensive range of home health services, including occupational therapy, designed to help clients maintain their independence and dignity while receiving the care they deserve in the comfort of their own homes. Their commitment to pioneering technology and therapeutic services ensures a high level of personalized care.

name: Personal Touch Home Care
description: Personal-Touch Home Care offers occupational therapy as part of its comprehensive range of home health and care services. With a team of approximately 500 licensed clinicians, the company ensures personalized care and continuous monitoring of patients' needs.

name: pt Health
description: pt Health offers comprehensive occupational therapy services delivered by highly trained and licensed therapists, focusing on enhancing daily living skills and overall wellness. Their commitment to patient-centered care includes innovative solutions and accessible options, such as Virtual Care for occupational therapy.

name: P.T. Services Rehabilitation Inc.
description: The company offers a variety of occupational therapy services, integrating with partner organizations to provide comprehensive rehabilitation and training for patients of all ages. Their focus includes both preventive training and rehabilitation programs, ensuring effective solutions for a safe return to work.

name: Reliant Rehabilitation
description: The company, Reliant Rehabilitation, is dedicated to enhancing the lives of patients through its commitment to occupational therapy.

name: PresenceLearning
description: Presence is a leading provider of online occupational therapy services specifically designed for K-12 districts catering to children with special needs. Their digital therapy platform allows schools to access licensed occupational therapists, enhancing service delivery and supporting students' development through innovative technology.

name: The OT Service
description: The OT Service, one of the UK's leading private occupational therapy companies, offers independent occupational therapy to a diverse clientele, including individuals and businesses, thereby enhancing service delivery and reducing waiting times for families in Newcastle.

name: OT Group
description: The OT Group is a prominent provider of Occupational Therapy services across Australia, emphasizing personalized care and strong client relationships. With over 20 years of experience, their team is dedicated to enhancing the quality of life for individuals, particularly within the disability sector.

name: Danville Orthopedic & Athletic Rehab
description: Danville Orthopedic & Athletic Rehab is a specialized service provider offering occupational therapy, among other rehabilitation services. With a focus on restoring motor function, they have multiple locations to ensure accessible outpatient therapy for patients.
